productDisplayName: Facit Men Printed Grey Innerwear Vest
description: CompositionGrey melange rib knit sleeveless vest made of 100% premium cotton, has a scooped neckline with a high back neck, wide arm holes, no itchy label, appliqued brand tab on the back and distressed look graphic lettering that flows from the front to the backFittingComfortWash careMachine wash warm at 40 degrees with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowDry cleanableLightweight with a scooped neck, this facit ribbed vest is crafted using pure cotton that allows the fabric to contour to your silhouette and help you stretch in ease. The armholes accentuate your shoulders, while the distressed look graphic placement print on the front and back saying "Relax" adds to rugged styling.
